category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the South African market under NRCS Letter of Authority and SANS standards.

title.en: China-to-South Africa LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入南非：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入南非：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against South African market-access requirements: NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) under the lighting Compulsory Specification, SANS/IEC safety standards (SANS IEC 60598, SANS IEC 62560, SANS IEC 62471), mandatory energy-efficiency labelling under SANS 941, and ICASA type approval for wireless models, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与南非市场准入要求差距对照：南非 NRCS 授权函（LOA）（依据照明强制性规范）、SANS/IEC 安全标准（SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560、SANS IEC 62471）、SANS 941 强制能效标签，以及无线机型的 ICASA 型号核准，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與南非市場准入要求差距對照：南非 NRCS 授權函（LOA）（依據照明強制性規範）、SANS/IEC 安全標準（SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560、SANS IEC 62471）、SANS 941 強制能效標籤，以及無線機型的 ICASA 型號核准，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NRCS determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current South African compulsory specifications, SANS standards, NRCS LOA procedures, SANS 941 energy labelling requirements, ICASA type approval rules, and any e-waste obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement. A locally established importer is generally required to hold the NRCS LOA.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRCS 裁定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行南非强制性规范、SANS 标准、NRCS LOA 流程、SANS 941 能效标签要求、ICASA 型号核准规则及任何电子废弃物义务。NRCS LOA 通常须由南非本地设立的进口商持有。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRCS 裁定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行南非強制性規範、SANS 標準、NRCS LOA 流程、SANS 941 能效標籤要求、ICASA 型號核准規則及任何電子廢棄物義務。NRCS LOA 通常須由南非本地設立的進口商持有。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to South Africa must obtain an NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) under the lighting Compulsory Specification before the product can be sold or imported; the LOA is typically applied for by a South Africa-based importer. Products must meet the relevant SANS/IEC safety standards (SANS IEC 60598 for luminaires, SANS IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps, SANS IEC 62471 for photobiological safety), and electrical products must satisfy SANS 941 mandatory energy-efficiency labelling. Wireless-enabled luminaires additionally require ICASA type approval. There is no horizontal RoHS-style substance restriction in South Africa; restricted-substance and e-waste obligations are partial and primarily addressed through producer/EPR registration under the National Environmental Management: Waste Act. None of these are covered by existing CCC certification or China GB compliance — verify all current requirements before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 向南非出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商，在产品可销售或进口前，须依据照明强制性规范取得 NRCS 授权函（LOA）；LOA 通常由南非本地进口商申请。产品须符合相关 SANS/IEC 安全标准（灯具 SANS IEC 60598、自镇流 LED 灯 SANS IEC 62560、光生物安全 SANS IEC 62471），电气产品须满足 SANS 941 强制能效标签要求。集成无线功能的灯具还须取得 ICASA 型号核准。南非不存在横向的 RoHS 式物质限制；限用物质及电子废弃物义务仅为部分性，主要通过《国家环境管理：废弃物法》下的生产者/EPR 登记处理。上述均不被现有 CCC 认证或中国 GB 合规所涵盖——出货前请核验所有现行要求。
answer_first.zht: 向南非出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商，在產品可銷售或進口前，須依據照明強制性規範取得 NRCS 授權函（LOA）；LOA 通常由南非本地進口商申請。產品須符合相關 SANS/IEC 安全標準（燈具 SANS IEC 60598、自鎮流 LED 燈 SANS IEC 62560、光生物安全 SANS IEC 62471），電氣產品須滿足 SANS 941 強制能效標籤要求。集成無線功能的燈具還須取得 ICASA 型號核准。南非不存在橫向的 RoHS 式物質限制；限用物質及電子廢棄物義務僅為部分性，主要通過《國家環境管理：廢棄物法》下的生產者/EPR 登記處理。上述均不被現有 CCC 認證或中國 GB 合規所涵蓋——出貨前請核驗所有現行要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official South African regulator, standards body (SABS/SANS), NRCS, ICASA, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. NRCS Compulsory Specification scope, SANS 941 thresholds, and the list of SANS/IEC editions in force must be re-verified on each review cycle.

q.en: What is an NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) and is it required for LED luminaires in South Africa?
q.zh: 什么是 NRCS 授权函（LOA）？LED 灯具进入南非是否需要它？
q.zht: 什麼是 NRCS 授權函（LOA）？LED 燈具進入南非是否需要它？

a.en: A Letter of Authority (LOA) is issued by the National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS) and authorises a product covered by a Compulsory Specification (VC) to be sold or imported into South Africa. Lighting and electrical products fall under compulsory specifications referencing SANS/IEC standards. The LOA is typically held by a South Africa-based importer, must be obtained before the product is placed on the market, and is separate from any voluntary SABS mark.
a.zh: 授权函（LOA）由南非国家强制性规范监管机构（NRCS）签发，授权受强制性规范（VC）涵盖的产品在南非销售或进口。照明和电气产品属于引用 SANS/IEC 标准的强制性规范范畴。LOA 通常由南非本地进口商持有，须在产品上市前取得，并独立于任何自愿性 SABS 标志。
a.zht: 授權函（LOA）由南非國家強制性規範監管機構（NRCS）簽發，授權受強制性規範（VC）涵蓋的產品在南非銷售或進口。照明和電氣產品屬於引用 SANS/IEC 標準的強制性規範範疇。LOA 通常由南非本地進口商持有，須在產品上市前取得，並獨立於任何自願性 SABS 標誌。

q.en: Does CCC certification or China GB compliance cover South African market-access requirements for LED luminaires?
q.zh: CCC 认证或中国 GB 合规是否涵盖 LED 灯具进入南非的市场准入要求？
q.zht: CCC 認證或中國 GB 合規是否涵蓋 LED 燈具進入南非的市場准入要求？

a.en: No. CCC and China GB standards are not recognised for NRCS LOA purposes. South Africa requires conformity to SANS/IEC standards (which adopt IEC editions), an NRCS LOA under the relevant Compulsory Specification, SANS 941 energy-efficiency labelling for electrical products, and ICASA type approval for wireless models. These are separate processes that must be completed for the South African market.
a.zh: 不。CCC 及中国 GB 标准不被 NRCS LOA 目的所认可。南非要求符合 SANS/IEC 标准（其采用 IEC 版本）、依据相关强制性规范取得 NRCS LOA、电气产品的 SANS 941 能效标签，以及无线机型的 ICASA 型号核准。这些是须为南非市场单独完成的流程。
a.zht: 不。CCC 及中國 GB 標準不被 NRCS LOA 目的所認可。南非要求符合 SANS/IEC 標準（其採用 IEC 版本）、依據相關強制性規範取得 NRCS LOA、電氣產品的 SANS 941 能效標籤，以及無線機型的 ICASA 型號核准。這些是須為南非市場單獨完成的流程。
